description: Create reusable confirmation components and migrate all 6 wizard confirmation pages to a harmonized design. Show all fields including empty ones. Responsive mobile-first.

userStories.title: Create 8 reusable confirmation components
userStories.description: Create components/confirmation/ with: PageShell, EntityHeader, SummaryBanner, Section, KeyValueGrid, FinancialHighlight, ContactGrid, DocumentList + barrel index.ts
acceptanceCriteria: 8 components created in components/confirmation/
All components accept className prop for extensibility
KeyValueGrid shows 'Non renseigne' for empty values
ContactGrid shows 'Aucun' per empty group
DocumentList shows uploaded + missing recommended
All responsive (mobile stack, tablet 2-col, desktop 3-4 col)
Lint passes
userStories.notes: All 8 components created with consistent API. Barrel index.ts exports all.

userStories.title: Migrate Immeuble confirmation page
userStories.description: Refactor building-confirmation-step.tsx to use new components.
acceptanceCriteria: BuildingConfirmationStep uses ConfirmationPageShell + EntityHeader + SummaryBanner
Building contacts use ConfirmationContactGrid with 4 groups + empty states
Building documents shown via ConfirmationDocumentList
Building interventions shown with dates and assignees
Each lot card shows contacts + documents + interventions
Empty fields show 'Non renseigne' or 'Aucun'
Responsive: mobile stack, tablet 2-col contacts, desktop 4-col contacts
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Most complex page. Lot cards with nested contacts/docs/interventions all migrated.

userStories.title: Migrate Lot confirmation page + add missing docs/interventions
userStories.description: Refactor lot-creation-form.tsx step 5 to use new components. FIX: add documents and interventions sections that are currently missing.
acceptanceCriteria: Lot confirmation uses ConfirmationPageShell + EntityHeader
Documents section added (was missing) showing lotDocUploads per lot
Interventions section added (was missing) showing scheduledInterventions per lot
Both 'existing' and 'independent' variants work
Independent lots show full address in KeyValueGrid
Empty states for all contact groups and optional fields
Responsive layout
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Key fix: Documents + Interventions sections added. Unused imports (CardHeader, CardTitle, Input) cleaned up.

userStories.title: Migrate Bail confirmation page
userStories.description: Refactor contract-form-container.tsx case 4 to use new components.
acceptanceCriteria: Bail confirmation uses ConfirmationPageShell + EntityHeader
FinancialHighlight shows loyer + charges + type + frequence + total
Guarantee section always visible (shows 'Aucune garantie' if none)
Signataires shown with ContactGrid (locataires + garants)
Documents via DocumentList with missing recommended alert
Interventions list with all enabled + disabled count
Rent reminder shown if enabled
Desktop: finances sidebar right, content left
Mobile: finances first (top), then content stack
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Desktop 2-col with FinancialHighlight sidebar. Mobile finances-first.

userStories.title: Migrate Contrat fournisseur confirmation page
userStories.description: Refactor supplier-confirmation-step.tsx to use new components.
acceptanceCriteria: Supplier confirmation uses ConfirmationPageShell (3xl) + EntityHeader
Each contract shows all fields including 'Non renseigne' for empty ones
Rappels/interventions from step 2 shown per contract (was missing)
FinancialHighlight for total recap at bottom
File names shown (not just count)
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Per-contract cards with all 7 fields. File names visible.

userStories.title: Migrate Contact confirmation page
userStories.description: Refactor step-4-confirmation.tsx to use new components.
acceptanceCriteria: Contact confirmation uses ConfirmationPageShell (3xl) + EntityHeader
Societe section: shows company info or 'Aucune societe (personne physique)'
All coordonnees shown including empty phone/notes
Acces & invitation section with status explanation
Entity link section always visible ('Aucune liaison' if none)
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Icon color mapped per contact type. Pre-existing unused onInviteChange prop noted.

userStories.title: Migrate Intervention confirmation page
userStories.description: Refactor intervention-confirmation-summary.tsx to use new components.
acceptanceCriteria: Intervention confirmation uses ConfirmationPageShell + EntityHeader + SummaryBanner
Desktop: 2 columns (details+planning left, contacts+options right)
All scheduling variants handled (fixed, slots, flexible)
Empty description/instructions/files shown as 'Non renseigne'/'Aucun'
Contacts via ContactGrid (gestionnaires, prestataires, locataires)
Options section: devis, mode assignation, confirmation requise
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Desktop 2-column layout. All 3 scheduling variants handled. ~150 lines of inline JSX removed.
